place: Santikhiri Estate, Na Muang, Laem Set, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Cliff-Cascade Five-Bedroom Sea-View Villa, Laem Set, Koh Samui
blurb: An extraordinary five-bedroom villa built into a lush rocky cliff in the gated Santikhiri Estate at Laem Set, its living spaces cascading down four storeys of timber decks and stone terraces to a waterfall plunge pool, with a 180-degree view across the Gulf of Siam. 900 m² of home on a 1,526 m² Chanote-titled plot, offered leasehold.
detail:
Built into a lush hillside within the gated Santikhiri Estate at Laem Set, this extraordinary five-bedroom villa commands a breathtaking 180-degree panorama across the Gulf of Siam. The 900 m² home is designed to cascade down toward the ocean, its living spaces following the natural slope of the cliff: a series of timber decks and stone terraces descends over four storeys to a deck with a private plunge pool, a man-made waterfall and sunbeds, while a separate platform doubles as a yoga deck and sunset lounge — every room thoughtfully integrated with the landscape.

The interiors are seriously chic and entirely un-templated, with no two spaces alike. Floor-to-ceiling glass doors invite the outdoors in, and vintage and designer furnishings sit alongside curated artworks for a unique, welcoming atmosphere throughout. The home centres on an open-plan living room with a projector and SONOS sound system, a minimalist kitchen, an outdoor bar, an outdoor wet kitchen and an al-fresco dining area, with five stylish en-suite bedrooms — six bathrooms in all — each opening to a private balcony.

The property sits on a 1,526 m² plot held on a Chanote title and is offered on a leasehold basis. Santikhiri is one of the island's most established gated estates, with 24-hour security and a residents' pool a short walk up the hill, and the villa is fully serviceable with an established rental track record. It is a short drive from Lamai Beach and the Kamalaya wellness sanctuary, with the island's dining and amenities within easy reach — a rare architectural home for an owner or as an income-producing investment.
